items.title: UPQODE Website Launch — Final Approval Needed Today
items.summary: UPQODE team is blocked waiting for final approval on website copy changes. Client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning requires resolution today.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve final website copy changes so UPQODE can push to production before tomorrow's client demo.

items.title: LeadMaker SDR Proposal Follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker following up on sales proposal for full-time SDR for inbound lead management and patient engagement.
items.actionNeeded: Decide whether to proceed with LeadMaker SDR proposal and schedule call to review candidates if interested.
